positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric illustration of a celestial body: a stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of abstract, glowing stars. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a clean, single-color screen print on apparel. Use negative space extensively. The style should evoke Art Deco symmetry mixed with modern vector graphic quality, featuring smooth, thick outlines and solid fields of color, limited to deep indigo blue, metallic gold, and cream off-white. The overall aesthetic must be sharp, bold, and suitable for high-contrast merchandise printing, viewed from straight on.
negative: blur, noisy, sketch, watercolor, gradients, photorealistic, watermark, text, logo, signature, excessive detail, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, low resolution, artifacts, noise
